Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.util.model

Class PeriodAnalysisDerivedMultiPeriodicModel

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.util.model.PeriodAnalysisDerivedMultiPeriodicModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
IAlgorithm, IInteruptible, IModel
public class PeriodAnalysisDerivedMultiPeriodicModel extends Object implements IModel
This class creates a multi-periodic fit model for the specified observations and provides measures of error.

  • Constructor Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • PeriodAnalysisDerivedMultiPeriodicModel

      public PeriodAnalysisDerivedMultiPeriodicModel(PeriodAnalysisDataPoint topDataPoint, List<Harmonic> harmonics, IPeriodAnalysisAlgorithm algorithm)
      Constructor
      Parameters:
      topDataPoint - The top period analysis datapoint May be null!
      harmonics - A list of harmonics used as input to the fit algorithm.
      algorithm - The algorithm to be executed to generate the fit.

    • toString

    • getModelFunction

      public ContinuousModelFunction getModelFunction()
      Description copied from interface: IModel
      Returns the model function and context. This is required for creating a line plot to show the model as a continuous function. If a model creator cannot sensibly return such a function, it may return null and no such plot will be possible. It could also be useful for analysis purposes, e.g. analytic extrema finding.
      Specified by:
      getModelFunction in interface IModel
      Returns:
      The function object.
